start_small_build_courage_each: Start small. Build courage. Each discard teaches your brain that letting go is safe.
you_go_at_your_own_pace_nobody: 💙 "You go at your own pace. Nobody rushes you here."
pick_5_items_we_ll_sort_them_b: Pick 5 items. We'll sort them by difficulty.
start_from_the_bottom_work_up_: Start from the bottom. Work up slowly. 🌱
find_one_pick_it_up_hold_it_in: Find one. Pick it up. Hold it in your hands.
notice_what_comes_up_you_don_t: Notice what comes up. You don't have to make it go away.
before_you_let_it_go_take_a_br: Before you let it go, take a breath.
anxiety_is_high_and_that_s_oka: Anxiety is high — and that's okay.
i_m_ready_to_let_it_go: I'm Ready to Let It Go →
whatever_you_feel_you_did_it_t: "Whatever you feel — you did it. That's what matters."
your_anxiety_came_down_that_s_: "Your anxiety came down. That's your brain learning it's safe to let go."
every_time_you_do_this_it_gets: Every time you do this, it gets easier. Not because the items matter less — but because you matter more.
every_rung_you_climb_is_proof_: "Every rung you climb is proof you are stronger than your fear."
